structural_claim: Phase transitions can occur where macroscopic numbers of particles collectively occupy the same quantum state, creating new forms of matter

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Below a critical temperature, bosonic atoms undergo a phase transition where a macroscopic fraction occupies the same quantum state

supporting_results.result_name: Neutron Star Equation of State Constraints
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Ultra-dense matter in neutron stars may form exotic quantum phases including quark matter or color superconductors
